headlines.title: SpaceX leapfrogs Amazon in market cap, briefly jumps Microsoft among top U.S. companies
headlines.summary: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030.

headlines.title: Trump signals he could send details of Iran deal to Congress

headlines.title: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
headlines.summary: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.

headlines.summary: FBI Director Kash Patel said multiple people are in custody after law enforcement disrupted an alleged plot targeting Sunday’s UFC event at the White House.

headlines.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.

headlines.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.

headlines.title: Wall Street's fear gauge tumbles as traders bid up SpaceX shares

headlines.title: Here’s when gas prices will come down if the U.S. deal to end the Iran war pans out
headlines.summary: The average retail gasoline price was just above the psychologically significant $4-per-gallon mark on Monday.

headlines.title: Oil may move through the Strait of Hormuz first, leaving fertilizer supplies stranded
headlines.summary: The interim peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran seems to be doing little to answer some of the thornier questions about the Strait of Hormuz, including how much longer it will take for products other than crude to start moving through again.

headlines.title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
headlines.summary: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”

headlines.summary: “He claimed that fixed-rate annuities are the sparkly, rainbow-fairyland of investments.”

headlines.summary: “When the time comes, there will be a substantial inheritance to be split 50/50 between our two children.”
